title: Smoked Tofu Noodle Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy Asian-inspired noodle dish made with smoked tofu, noodles, and a variety of savory ingredients.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to package instructions.
Cut the smoked tofu into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the charred soy sauce and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Japanese chili flakes and cook for another minute.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Top with green onions and sesame seeds.
